awesomeList.descriptionHTML: 😎 A curated awesome list for Composer, Packagist, Satis, Plugins, Scripts, Composer related resources, tutorials.
awesomeList.description: :sunglasses: A curated awesome list for Composer, Packagist, Satis, Plugins, Scripts, Composer related resources, tutorials.

nodes.itemHTML: • Composer Semver Range Checker - A tool to help check the satisfiable ranges of a composer constraint.
• repman-io/composer-pluginstars8 - This plugin enables downloading via Repman by adding a distribution mirror URL for all your dependencies (without need to update the composer.lock file).
• Composer-Compile-Pluginstars6 - Allow PHP libraries to define simple, freeform compilation tasks. Support post-install hooks in any package.
• Composer-Symlinkerstars19 - Enables you to load packages from different directories (instead of loading them from /vendor).
• Issues
• Source
• Getting Started Guide and Installation Instructions
• NodeJS-Installerstars104 - Installer for NodeJS and npm.
• Node-Composerstars2 - Installer for NodeJS, npm and yarn.

• CycloneDX-PHP-Composerstars9 - Creates a CycloneDX "Software Bill-of-Materials" (SBOM) for the dependencies of a project. The SBOM enables dependency monitoring and risk analysis by OWASP DependencyTrack.
• fxpio/tugstars21 - Enables you to host a private Composer registry on AWS Serverless serving your private PHP packages, which are hosted on Github or Gitlab services.
• Cloudsmith - A fully managed package management SaaS with PHP/Composer support (and many others).
• Composer-Unusedstars674 - A CLI tool, which scans your code and shows unused Composer dependencies.
• repman.io & repman-io/repmanstars287 - A Private PHP Package Repository Manager & Packagist Proxy.
• PhantomJS-Installerstars147 - A Composer Package which installs the PhantomJS binary (Linux, Windows, Mac) into /bin of your project.
• Composer-Vendor-Cleanupstars1 - A script which removes whitelisted unnecessary files (like tests/docs etc.) from the vendor directory.
• Composer Substitution Pluginstars37 - A Composer plugin replacing placeholders in the scripts section by dynamic values.
• CheatSheet - Overview of CLI commands and composer.json schema.
• Composer-Patchsetstars5 - Automatically fetch, update and apply patches to any composer package with a twist - store the patchset as a composer package itself.
• Composer-Normalizestars615 - The plugin helps to keep your composer.json file(s) consistent by restructuring and sorting entries (normalizing).
• Packetonstars148 - Private self-hosted Composer repository for vendors. Fork of packagist with adding support for authorization, customer users, groups, webhooks.
• Nils Adermann (naderman)
• Composer-Vendor-Cleanerstars9 - Plugin removes unnecessary development files and directories from vendor directory by glob pattern syntax.
• Private-Composer-Installerstars175 - Install helper outsourcing sensitive keys from the package URL into environment variables.

• Drupal Vendor Hardening Composer Pluginstars9 - Removes extraneous directories from the project's vendor directory & adds .htaccess and web.config files to the root of the project's vendor directory.

• Slides by Nils Adermann
    • Source: https://naderman.de/slippy/src/
    • PHP Reinvented - How Composer helped shape the new way of writing PHP
    • Composer Update
    • Dependency Management with Composer PHP Reinvented
    • [Managing dependencies is
• Packagist Mirrorstars147 - This script helps to setup a packagist mirror. It is the maintained and stable version of Packagist Crawlerstars57.
• Firegento - A Composer Repository providing Magento Modules.
• Composer-Downloads-Pluginstars3 - Lightweight mechanism to download external resources (ZIP/TAR files) with only a url and path.
• Bramus/Composer-Autocompletestars82 - A Bash/Shell autocompletion script for Composer.
• Composer/Xdebug-Handlerstars2.1k - Helps you to restart a CLI process without loading the xdebug extension.
• IRC channels are on irc.freenode.org: #composer for users and #composer-dev for development.
• Composer Exclusive Installstars0 - Prevents more than one install or update operation at a time.
• Dependabot - Dependabot is a dependency update service. It monitors and updates your dependencies by sending a pull-request. The service is free for public repos and personal account repos.
• Production-Dependencies-Guardstars78 - Prevents development packages from being added into require and getting into production environment.
• Composer PreferLowest Checkerstars11 - Strictly compare the specified minimum versions of your composer.json with the ones actually used by the prefer-lowest composer update command option.
• ParameterHandlerstars906 - Allows you to manage your ignored parameters when running a composer install or update.
• Toolystars99 - Manage needed PHAR files in your project composer.json. Every PHAR file will be saved in the composer binary directory. Optional with GPG verification for every PHAR.
• Melodystars403 - One-file composer scripts.
• Composer-MonoRepo-Pluginstars275 - The plugin helps to manage dependencies for multiple packages in a single repository.
• Composer-Shared-Package-Pluginstars169 - Allows you to share selected packages between your projects by creating symlinks.

• Composer-Custom-Directory-Installerstars119 - A composer plugin, to install different types of composer packages in custom directories outside the default composer installation path (vendor folder).
• PHPCodeSniffer-Composer-Installerstars309 - The plugin enables you to install PHP_CodeSnifferstars8.5k coding standards (rulesets).
• Composer-Servicestars175 - Enables you to run Composer as a service on a remote server.
• Graph-Composerstars741 - Provides a graph visualization for your project's composer.json and its dependencies.
• Composer-Patchesstars198 - Applies a patch from a local or remote file to any package that is part of a given composer project.
• Composer Registry Managerstars459 - Enables you to switch between different composer repositories.
• WordPress Packagist - Mirrors the WordPress plugin and theme directories as a Composer repository.
• Asset Packagist - Enables installation of Bower and NPM packages as native Composer packages.
• Drupal Packagist - Composer repositories for Drupal 7 and 8 core, modules, and themes.

• Satis Serverstars97 - This docker container provides a Satis Server and enables you to run a private, self-hosted Composer repository with support for Git, Mercurial, and Subversion, HTTP API, HTTPs support, webhook handler and scheduled builds.
• Release Beltstars134 - Self–hosted Composer repository implementation to quickly integrate ZIP files of third party non–Composer releases.
• Composer Best Practices 2018 - Nils Adermann @ phpday 2018
• Composer-Ignore-Pluginstars18 - Enables you to remove files and folders from the vendor folder (to make a cleaner and smaller deployment to production). It's an alternative to .gitattributes.
• PackageInfostars6 - Enables you to retrieve all package informations (like version, tag, release date, description).
• Composer-Yamlstars53 - This tool converts composer.yml to composer.json.
• Foxystars138 - Composer plugin that executes npm/yarn packages installation operations, when composer package is installed or updated.

• Africa
    • South Africa - packagist.co.za
• Private Packagist Cloud - A Composer Repository as a Service for private packages and to mirror packages from other repositories.
• Private Packagist Enterprise - On-premise self-hosted version of Private Packagist.
• Private Packagist API Clientstars26 - A PHP client for the Private Packagist API. The client handles authentication, signature generation and access to all endpoints.
• PHP Incstars5 - Automatically includes files for autoload and autoload-dev to facilitate using functions and grouped definitions within composer loaded applications.
• Composer Preloadstars177 - The plugin generates a vendor/preload.php file to warm up the Opcache.
• Wonderful World of Composer
• Narrowspark-Automaticstars11 - Automates the most common tasks of applications, boost package downloads, adds a composer security audit and more.
• Imposter-Pluginstars97 - Wrapping all composer vendor packages inside your own namespace. Intended for WordPress plugins.
• Composer-Git-Hooksstars853 - A library for easily managing git hooks in your composer config.
• Composer-Travis-Lintstars6 - Allows you to lint the Travis CI configuration file (.travis.yml).
• Composer-Multiteststars5 - Enables you to run a Composer script against multiple, locally installed PHP versions, which are managed by PHPBrew or phpenv.
• Docker Imagestars28 - This Docker image helps to create a customized packagist mirror.
• Packagist Mirror from Indonesiastars32 - Another implementation for creating a packagist mirror.
• Creating and Using Composer Packages
• OctoLinker Browser Extensionstars4.7k - Enables you to navigate Composer/NPM dependencies on Github.
• PHP Composer Magento Tutorial by Alan Storm

• North America
    • Canada - packagist.org Main mirror

• South America
    • Brazil - packagist.com.br
• Composer-Plugin-QAstars25 - Comprehensive Plugin for composer to execute PHP Quality assurance Tools.
• Managing dependencies is more than running "composer update" - Nils Adermann @ phpsrb17
• Composer Locatorstars61 - Provides a means of locating the installation path for a given Composer package name.
• Composer-Warmupstars176 - The plugin adds the command warmup-opcode to Composer, which triggers the compilation of all PHP files discovered in your project into the Opcache.
• PHP Dependency Management with Composer
• Symfony-Flexstars3.5k - Provides recipe-basedstars732 installation and configuration management for Symfony packages.
• ToranProxy (deprecated) - In addition to providing a composer repository ToranProxy acts as a proxy server for Packagist and GitHub.
• ComposerRequireCheckerstars570 - A CLI tool to analyze dependencies and verify that no unknown imported symbols are used in the sources of a package.
• Composer-Patchesstars1.1k - The plugin applies a patch from a local or remote file to any required package.
• Composer-Bin-Pluginstars298 - Adds support for managing dependencies for multiple packages in a single repository or isolate bin dependencies.
• Composer-Inheritance-Pluginstars18 - Opinionated version of Wikimedia composer-merge-plugin to work in pair with Bamarni composer-bin-plugin.
• Easy package management with Composer
• Composer SemVer Checker - Enables you identify constraint to version resolution issues, by doing a semantic version check for Packagist hosted packages.
• Composer-Asset-Pluginstars898 - A npm/Bower Dependencies Manager for Composer.
• Satis Control Panelstars144 - A simple web UI for managing your Satis Repository with optional CI integration.
• Satis Gostars97 - A web server for managing Satis configuration and hosting the generated Composer repository.
• Composer Primer
• ScriptsDevstars64 - Enables you to use a scripts-dev section, which triggers scripts only in dev mode.
• Composer Stability Flags
• Composer Versioning
• Jordi Boggiano (seldaek)
• A beginners guide to Composer
• A short & simple Composer tutorial
• Composer Best Practices — Jordi Boggiano @ php[tek] 2015
• PHP Composer Quickstart
• How Composer helped shape the new way of writing PHP - Nils Adermann @ Drupal Camp Frankfurt
• Composer Package Management - Nils Adermann @ T3CON12DE
• Documentation for Plugins - This offical documentation is good starting point, when writing a Composer plugin.
• Composer-AWSstars76 - The plugin loads repository data and downloads packages from Amazon S3 (with authentication support for private repositories).
• Composer-Compositionstars108 - Provides an API, for checking your environment at runtime.
• Composer-Suggeststars5 - Enables you to install a custom group of suggested packages, based on keyword patterns.
• Composer-Versions-Checkstars229 - Shows outdated packages from last major versions after using the update command (showing "Latest is vX.Y.Z").

• Composer-Changelogsstars540 - Provides a summary of the updates with links to changelog/releasenote/tag. The output is ready to be pasted into the commit message when updating the composer.lock file.
• Composer-Merge-Pluginstars729 - Merges multiple composer.json files at Composer runtime.
• Composer-Patches-Pluginstars71 - Enables you to provide patches for any package from any package. When the dependency is fetched, the patch is applied on top.
• Composer-Cleanup-Pluginstars118 - Removes tests & documentation folders from the vendor dir.
• Composer-Cleanerstars117 - The tool removes unnecessary files and directories from the vendor directory.
• Prestissimostars6.3k - A parallel downloader using phpext_curl.
• Composer-Curl-Pluginstars4 - The plugin use phpext_curl for downloading packages.
• Composer-Dependency-Analyzer - Allows you to build a dependency graph for an installed composer project.
• PackageVersionsstars3.3k - Provides a very quick and easy access to installed composer dependency versions.

• Studiostars1k - A workbench for developing Composer packages. Its an alternative to editing dependencies in the vendor folder or using PathRepositories to load a local clone of your dependency into your project.
• Official Website
• Githubstars25.1k
• Documentation
• Find Packages on Packagist
• Composer Installersstars1.3k - Composer installers for multiple frameworks.
• You might use the following tags: composer-php, packagist, satis + php.

    • China - php.cnpkg.org, https://pkg.phpcomposer.com/, https://mirrors.aliyun.com/composer/
    • India - https://packagist.in/
    • Indonesia - packagist.phpindonesia.id
    • Japan - packagist.jp
• Gitlab-Composerstars164 - This is a branch/tag indexer for Gitlab repositories.
• Satisfystars409 - Satis composer repository manager with a Web UI.
